scripts.dev: npm run build -w @matter-siege/shared && npm run build -w @matter-siege/sim && npm run dev -w @matter-siege/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @matter-siege/shared && npm run build -w @matter-siege/sim && npm run dev -w @matter-siege/server
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n WEB,SERVER -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @matter-siege/shared && npm run build -w @matter-siege/sim && npm run build -w @matter-siege/web && npm run build -w @matter-siege/server
scripts.test: npm run build -w @matter-siege/shared && npm run build -w @matter-siege/sim && npm run test -w @matter-siege/sim && npm run test -w @matter-siege/server
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
